name: Temperature Effects

graph TD

U2 --> W2[Temperature Efficiency]
V2 --> X2[Temperature Characterization]
W2 --> Y2[Process Optimization]
X2 --> Z2[Final Temperature Conditions]
Y2 --> Z2
